format:
(UINT32)   Cookie
 (UINT8)   Status
 (UINT8)   Number of candidates
(STRING)[] Usernames
remarks_html:
Contains the list of potential candidates.

Status is one of the Clan Message Codes:

  • 0x00: Successfully found candidate(s)
  • 0x01: Clan tag in use
  • 0x02: Too soon because you recently created a clan (product key based)
  • 0x08: Not allowed because you are already in clan
  • 0x0A: Invalid clan tag specified

comments.content_html: Im pretty sure 0x02 response means that your CD-key is currently clanned. I have been receiving it during clan creation on clanned CD-keys.
